% https://q.uiver.app/#
\documentclass[tikz]{standalone}
\input{preambles.tex}
\begin{document}
\begin{tikzcd}
	& {(X\otimes Y)\otimes Z} && {Z \otimes (X\otimes Y)} & \\
	{X\otimes (Y \otimes Z)} &&&& {(Z\otimes X)\otimes Y} \\
	& {X\otimes(Z\otimes Y)} && {(X\otimes Z) \otimes Y}
	\arrow["{\tau_{X, Y\otimes Z}}", from=1-2, to=1-4]
	\arrow["{\alpha_{Z,X,Y}^{-1}}", from=1-4, to=2-5]
	\arrow["{\alpha_{X,Y,Z}^{-1}}", from=2-1, to=1-2]
	\arrow["{\id_{X} \otimes \tau_{Y,Z}}"', from=2-1, to=3-2]
	\arrow["{\alpha_{X,Z,Y}^{-1}}"', from=3-2, to=3-4]
	\arrow["{\tau_{X,Z}\otimes \id_{Y}}"', from=3-4, to=2-5]
\end{tikzcd}
\end{document}
